title: Spooki's Unique Mobs
description: Integrations of 46 variant versions of classic minecraft monsters. New zombies, skeletons, spiders, oh my!
body: Spooki's Unique Mobs adds 46 mob variants that spawn naturally across your world. Each variant has its own AI and abilities, and spawns in biomes that make sense for it. You may also find variant spawners in dungeons and mineshafts, plus variant blaze spawners in nether fortresses. Every variant plays differently. These aren't reskins. Supports Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric/Forge), 1.21.1 (Fabric/NeoForge), and 26.1 (Fabric). Fabric builds require [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). ## Zombies 10 zombie variants, from fire-trailing infernals to wall-mining builders. ![The Wither Zombie wandering a deepslate dripstone cavern, illuminated by lava.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/WitherZombieShot.png) - **Venomous Zombie** - poison on hit, leaves a poison cloud when it dies - **Infernal Zombie** - sets you on fire, leaves a fire trail, picks fights with piglins - **Frozen Zombie** - freezes water under its feet, applies slowness and freeze on hit - **Ender Zombie** - teleports when hurt, dies in water and rain - **Wither Zombie** - lobs wither skulls, can track two targets at once - **Sprinter Zombie** - fast and fragile, lunges at you, doesn't burn in daylight - **Builder Zombie** - mines through walls and builds bridges to reach you - **Plague Zombie** - withers nearby animals, buffs other zombies when it dies - **Armored Zombie** - tanky, high knockback resistance, just hard to kill - **Blossom Zombie** - floats after you, knocks you upward, stacks petal marks ## Skeletons 6 skeleton variants with different ranged tactics. ![An Ember Skeleton on a tree aims at a group of piglins being attacked by infernal zombies and other ember skeletons.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/EmberSkeletonShot.png) - **Sniper Skeleton** - shoots from up to 64 blocks away, lobs arrows over walls if it loses sight of you - **Ember Skeleton** - flaming arrows, fights piglins - **Ender Skeleton** - shoot, teleport, repeat - **Poison Skeleton** - climbs trees, perches up high, shoots poison arrows from above - **Multishot Skeleton** - fires 3 arrows per volley - **Blossom Skeleton** - fires blossom arrows and floats around targets ## Spiders 6 spider variants, each with a different way to ruin your day. ![An ice spider walking on a surface of powdered snow, chasing something off screen. Illuminated by moonlight.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/IceSpiderShot.png) - **Spitting Spider** - spits poison at range while circling you - **Wither Spider** - wither on hit, spawns cave spiders when killed - **Magma Spider** - turns stone into temporary magma blocks, sets things on fire - **Ice Spider** - pelts you with freezing snowballs then rushes in once you're frozen - **Jumping Spider** - tiny, pounces from mid-range, sometimes spawns in tree canopies - **Web Spinner Spider** - shoots webs to slow you down, rushes when you're stuck ## Creepers 9 creeper variants. One of them tunnels. ![A Sculk Creeper standing on the platform of an ancient city portal.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/SculkCreeperShot.png) - **Toxic Creeper** - explodes into a lingering poison cloud - **Wither Creeper** - big explosion with wither, slow fuse so you hear it coming - **Sculk Creeper** - tiny explosion, summons a warden. The creeper is just the alarm. - **Magma Creeper** - turns blocks into magma on detonation - **Frost Creeper** - ice explosion, bigger radius in cold biomes - **Ender Creeper** - teleports to you mid-fuse - **Lightning Creeper** - explosion calls down lightning - **Burrowing Creeper** - digs underground, tunnels behind you, surfaces and blows up - **Blossom Creeper** - bursts into petals, launches nearby targets upward ![A Blossom Creeper in a cherry grove.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/BlossomCreeperShot.png) ## Endermen 3 enderman variants. The assassin still requires eye contact, the enraged one doesn't care. ![An enderman assassin walks in the foreground, with two endermen behind as well as an Ender Zombie.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/EndShot.png) - **Assassin Enderman** - warps behind you, leaves damage clouds where it teleports from - **Enraged Enderman** - always hostile, uppercuts you into the air and teleports to where you land - **Blossom Enderman** - teleports with petal afterimages that pull you into blossom drift ## Blazes 5 blaze variants built around pressure, area denial, and burst damage. ![A Blast Blaze charging up in the Nether.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/BlastBlazeShot.png) - **Blast Blaze** - gets in close, charges up, then pops a fiery blast that launches you - **Storm Blaze** - marks where you're moving and fires lightning straight at that spot - **Wither Blaze** - fires wither ash bolts, drops ash clouds, gets nastier inside them - **Soul Blaze** - sweeps soul fire breath and leaves burning trails behind - **Brand Blaze** - brands you from range, can save and buff nearby hostile mobs ## Ghasts 7 ghast variants, from tiny dive-bombers to monsters that drag you into lava. ![A Wither Ghast drifts over a soul sand valley, its powerful beam pulling in something below.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/WitherGhastShot.png) - **Great Mother Ghast** - spawns ragelings instead of firing fireballs - **Delta Ghast** - long charge, then a tracking beam that burns through blocks - **Wither Ghast** - tractor beam pulls you in, then bites or drags you toward lava - **Rageling** - tiny attack ghast. Burns on contact, explodes when it's low on hp - **Skitterling** - dashes around dropping soul fire, then hits you with soul flame breath - **Obsidling** - armored dash ghast that tries to knock you into lava or off ledges - **Blightling** - side-steps into firing lanes and volleys blight spores at you ![A Skitterling dashing through the Nether.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/SkitterlingShot.png) ## Spawning Each variant is tied to biomes that fit it. You won't find ice spiders in deserts or magma spiders in tundras. Some are more flexible, like End mobs or specific variants. - **Cold biomes** - Frozen Zombie, Ice Spider, Frost Creeper - **Hot biomes and nether** - Infernal Zombie, Ember Skeleton, Magma Spider, Magma Creeper, Wither Zombie, Wither Spider, Wither Creeper - **Jungles and swamps** - Venomous Zombie, Plague Zombie, Poison Skeleton, Spitting Spider, Jumping Spider, Web Spinner Spider, Toxic Creeper - **Cherry groves and forests** - Blossom Zombie, Blossom Skeleton, Blossom Creeper, Blossom Enderman - **The End** - Ender Zombie, Ender Skeleton, Ender Creeper, Assassin Enderman, Enraged Enderman - **Deep dark** - Sculk Creeper - **General overworld** - Sprinter Zombie, Armored Zombie, Builder Zombie, Multishot Skeleton, Sniper Skeleton, Lightning Creeper, Burrowing Creeper Dungeon, trial spawners, and mineshaft spawners can also roll variant mobs based on the biome they generate in. Includes compatibility with [YUNG's Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons/) and [YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-nether-fortresses/) on 1.20.1. ![A mineshaft spawner generating a number of spitting spiders.](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Spookipup/spookis-unique-mobs/master/pictures/MineshaftPoisonSpiderShot.png) ## Other Info - More variants for other mob types are planned, but with all the nether mobs in, it's now just a matter of thinking of interesting variants to fight. - Some textures are made by me, and a larger number are made by LawricArt.
